task_completion.description: Verify that the raw survey data 'raw_survey_with_errors.csv' has been loaded into the TopoCal application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal interface showing the loaded points, or an open/import dialog indicating 'raw_survey_with_errors.csv' was successfully opened.

task_completion.description: Verify that erroneous elevation points (blunders) have been identified and removed from the dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the selection and deletion of points with anomalous Z values (e.g., extreme spikes or dips visible in the 3D view, or obvious outliers in the point list).

task_completion.description: Verify that an accurate triangulation (MDT) has been generated from the cleaned survey data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal interface displaying a generated mesh or triangulation network (MDT) that appears smooth and free of extreme deformations or spikes caused by blunders.

task_completion.description: Verify that the corrected project is saved as 'cleaned_survey.top'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the application title bar showing the file saved as 'cleaned_survey.top' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the cleaned list of points is exported to 'cleaned_points.csv'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, save prompt, or confirmation message showing points being saved to 'cleaned_points.csv' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\' directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the TopoCal GUI to process the data and generate the MDT.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the TopoCal application interface being actively used to manipulate the data, rather than a text editor or spreadsheet program modifying the CSV files directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of PowerShell, Command Prompt, or terminal windows executing scripts to filter the CSV or mock the creation of the .top and .csv output files.

integrity.description: Ensure the MDT generation actually occurred in the software and wasn't just a mock file creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D view or plan view in TopoCal must show the actual triangulated surface (MDT) rendered on screen before the project is saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Note: This task is entirely defective. All execution scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) and data files are missing from the environment, making the task completely unscorable and unplayable.
